name: CryptoSentinel
description: Autonomous 24/7 crypto trading agent on Base chain. Monitors live market data, scans the Base ecosystem for trending tokens, makes AI-driven trading decisions using Claude Sonnet, executes trades via Uniswap V3, and logs every decision immutably onchain. Exposes trading signals as a paid x402 API service.
supportedTools: CoinGecko API — live ETH/BTC price feeds
Fear and Greed Index API — market sentiment
DexScreener API — Base ecosystem token scanner
Uniswap V3 SwapRouter02 — onchain trade execution
Anthropic Claude API — market analysis and reasoning
Telegram Bot API — real-time trade notifications
x402 Signal Server — paid signal API
safetyGuardrails: Minimum 60% confidence required before any trade
Maximum 2% portfolio risk per ETH trade
Maximum 1% portfolio risk per altcoin trade
Error fallback always defaults to HOLD
Testnet simulation on Base Sepolia — no mainnet risk
decisionLoop: market_data → token_scan → claude_analysis → risk_check → execute → log_onchain → notify

services.name: x402 Signal API
services.description: Pay 0.10 USDC to receive Claude's current market analysis — action, confidence, reasoning, and top Base tokens

services.name: Preview API
services.description: Free preview showing ETH price and Fear and Greed index without the actionable signal
